creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to crest from comment #3)
This doesn't really make sense. bug #269387 has already been committed for instance. And bug #269349 does not provide any indication for waiting for other PRs to be committed first whatsoever.

If you ports need to be updated a the "same time", you can just indicate so in the PRs or if needed create a PR for both ports.

I will close this umbrella PR.
